choices: On Jennifer’s Bed While She Is Sleeping
1.content:
You are Jack, a 13 year old orphan who lives in a careless orphanage.

Jack is a massive fan of the Actress/Singer Jennifer Lopez (https://media.allure.com/photos/5de42f48...) You love everything about her from her Brown Skin, Her Full Lips, Her Latino New York Accent, Her Sculptured Body, Her Huge Ass And Most Of All Her FEET (you have a foot fetish)

You wish you can leave this place and be with Jennifer Lopez. One night you are actually desperate enough to wish on a star and wish that you can be with her and you don’t care how (even though you should).

The next morning you wake up in a strange envoirmemt....
1.title: Getting Shrunk

14.content:
Jack wakes up in a strange environment.

Jack observes his strange surroundings and see that his surface is leather. Jack looks around and is extremely confusing to we’re he is until he here’s a loud noise.

Jack turns around and see a giant Jennifer Lopez walking in and you realise that you are the size of an ant compared to her. Jack is in both shock and awe when he see his crush as a giant woman.

JACK: “HOLY SHIT ITS JENNIFER LOPEZ, I can’t believe it my wish came true.... but how am I tiny”

You also realise that you are in Jennifer Lopez’s private gym. She is wearing a tight black training bra and pant and she is also barefoot.

Jack witnesses the giants amazing boobs and abs as she walks towards your spot. You try to get her attention but she can obviously can’t her you.

Jen gets ready to train (unaware that you are on her equipment).

Where are you.
14.title: In Jennifer’s Gym

15.content: What roles is Jennifer playing
15.title: Jennifer’s Trailer (Or Movie Set)

155.content: Who else should she play.
155.title: Other

1553.content:
No! Don't eat me! You mumble in your sleep. You shake yourself awake, wipe the drool off your cheek, and realize that once again you have passed out looking at photos of Jennifer Lopez on your phone. Specifically it was from a Rolling Stone photoshoot and J.Lo is modeling gold metal bikinis while posing as a warrior princess. Pretty obscure but you are of fine tastes and there is just something about metal bikinis that has a strong appeal.

https://imgur.com/a/to4suyq

You rub the reddened spot where your phone landed on your face, and get up on your feet only to realize that you are no longer laying in bed. Or anything that remotely resembles your old dorm! You get a stable hold on the strange soft-feeling ground and look around. You hop on it and realize from the squares and circles all over the ground that it is a long neverending red rug. Awfully familiar, you think suspiciously. You keep walking and then it suddenly hits you as the shadow begins to form over you.

You're suddenly in awe of J.Lo's colossal body laying down. In front of you is the view of her humongous upper body. Her huge breast looked uncomfortable but shiny and very hot in the metallic gear. Just like in the photoshoot! You gasp. It is what you always wanted. She has a hand on her face and her gold bikini-clad body is in a reclining position on the rug. There are no wild cheetahs around because you remember those were added digitally. You get closer and her head is becoming like a huge barrier in your path. Her long dyed hair is spread out all over the rug in thick strands. She occasionally blinks but doesn't move much aside from that. This whole setup seems odd to you, is it a photoshoot? You don't even see any cameras.

You keep walking without paying attention and your leg gets caught on a loose thread. You trip over and start rolling uncontrollably until you come to a sudden halt. You also can't move and it is because you have rolled right into a gap in the rug. You're trapped like a pebble someone brings inside unaware in the treads of their shoe.
1553.title: Jungle Goddess

info.brief_description: Jack has shrunk and has to survive the giant Jennifer Lopez PLEASE ADD.
info.description:
Jack is mysteriously shrunk to 1cm tall and is in the unaware presence of Jennifer Lopez

Be Free To Write On This Story, But Please Follow Theses Rules If You Can

RULES:
DON’T KILL JACK OFF (Don’t End The Story)
Keep It Unaware (Meaning He Never Gets Discovered As A Shrunken Man/If Found He Is A Toy Or A Bug)
Keep It Focused On A Jennifer Lopez (No Solo Men/Maybe Sex)
Anything Sexual Goes
Try To Describe Jennifer Lopez/Use Image Links
